sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَلْعَبًا جَدِيدًا لِكُرَةِ الْقَدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio novi fudbalski teren.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a new football field.

sentences.translation: Teren se nalazi blizu velike škole.
sentences.translationEn: The field is located near the large school.

sentences.arabic: سَيَتَدَرَّبُ فِيهِ الأَطْفَالُ وَالشَّبَابُ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i mladi će se tu trenirati svake sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: Children and youth will train there every week.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَئِيسُ الْبَلَدِيَّةِ إِنَّ الرِّيَاضَةَ مُهِمَّةٌ لِلشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik općine je rekao da je sport važan za mlade.
sentences.translationEn: The mayor said that sports are important for youth.
